idea_clean: For morning and evening review: (109) I rest in God. I rest in God today, and let Him work in me and through me, while I rest in Him in quiet and in perfect certainty. (110) I am as God created me. I am God's Son. Today I lay aside all sick illusions of myself, and let my Father tell me Who I really am. On the hour: I rest in God. On the half hour: I am as God created me.

practice_instructions.frequency: Twice a day (morning/evening), plus hourly and half-hourly reminders
practice_instructions.description: Morning/evening: Spend 5 minutes reviewing the ideas. Hourly: Repeat the first idea on the hour. Half-hourly: Repeat the second idea on the half-hour.
